title: Task-switch hygiene
failure_mode: Old unrelated auth/docs/test work pollutes a new parser task.
output_preview: {"current_task":"Fix CSV header parsing so spaces around comma-separated header names are trimmed.","proposed_fix":"Locate the CSV header parsing code and update it to trim whitespace from each header name after splitting on commas, preserving existing behavior otherwise.","stale_context_policy":"Ignore prior unrelated context unless it directly affects this parser issue.","next_action":"Inspect the parser implementation and tests, then add or update a focused test for headers like `name, age, city`."}
